proposed_relations.description: Same B44 SBS project on Nostrand/Rogers; CB3 presentation (May 11, 2010) describes identical 9.3-mile corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay, B44 Limited to SBS conversion.
Same B44 SBS/BRT project on Nostrand/Rogers; CB9 presentation (June 22, 2010) describes identical corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay, B44 Limited to SBS conversion.

rationale: Same SBS project: both describe converting B44 Limited to Select Bus Service on Nostrand Avenue (southbound) and Rogers Avenue (northbound) from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay. The observation (April 26, 2010 CAC slides) and the target record (December 2009 CAC, May/June 2010 CB presentations) are different source-document snapshots of the identical proposed project — same corridor, same route, same project type, same status. The minor difference in borough listing (Brooklyn+Queens vs. Brooklyn) is a payload artifact; the corridor itself is entirely within Brooklyn.
issues: proposed_relations[0].evidence_refs must cite at least one source block
proposed_relations[1].evidence_refs must cite at least one source block

The minor difference in borough listing (Brooklyn+Queens vs. Brooklyn) is a payload artifact; the corridor itself is entirely within Brooklyn.
